title: Port progress updater from Python to Go
description: Implement the ledger/README updater in Go using the algorithm described in docs/reference/update-progress-algorithm.md and replace the legacy Python script.

required_inputs.notes: Authoritative spec to follow during port.
Access to git-mind checkout for validation (path via --root).

expected_outputs.notes: Go binary replicating Python behavior with tests.
Document kept in sync if behavior changes.
